scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=server && npm run build:prod --workspace=client
scripts.docker:build: docker compose build && docker builder prune --keep-storage 3g --force
scripts.docker:build:test: docker compose -f testing/docker-compose.test.yml build && docker builder prune --keep-storage 3g --force
scripts.docker:down: docker compose down -v && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path'),d=p.join('config');try{fs.readdirSync(d).forEach(f=>fs.unlinkSync(p.join(d,f)))}catch{};console.log('Full uninstall complete — volumes + config/ removed')"
scripts.test:up: docker compose -f testing/docker-compose.test.yml up --build -d && node testing/sync/setup.js
scripts.test:down: docker compose -f testing/docker-compose.test.yml down -v && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path');['a','b','c'].forEach(x=>{const d=p.join('testing','sync','configs',x);try{fs.readdirSync(d).forEach(f=>fs.unlinkSync(p.join(d,f)))}catch{}});console.log('Full wipe complete — volumes + bind-mount configs removed')"
scripts.test:all: npm run test:integration && npm run test:sync && npm run test:redteam && npm run test:standalone
